# XCUIDevice.Button.action

**Case**

The device’s action button.

## Declaration

```swift
case action
```

## Discussion

The button you use for specific actions in workout apps, available in watchOS 9 and later on Apple Watch Ultra. You can use [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIDevice/hasHardwareButton(_:)] to check for its availability from your test.

## Device buttons

- **XCUIDevice.Button.home**: The device’s home button.
- **XCUIDevice.Button.volumeUp**: The device’s volume up button.
- **XCUIDevice.Button.volumeDown**: The device’s volume down button.
- **XCUIDevice.Button.camera**: The device’s camera button.
title: XCUIDevice.Button.action
